display_name: 孤独跑者猜想 n=11（前沿辅助）
benchmark_scope: Prove the Lonely Runner Conjecture for n=11 runners: given 10 runners with distinct positive integer speeds on the unit circle, there exists a time when all are simultaneously at distance >= 1/11 from the fixed runner.
planning_constraints: Frontier partial results may be used as seeds, but you must still explain what gap remains for n = 11.
If a Fourier / covering / view-obstruction route is used, identify exactly which reduction steps are imported and which step still requires new work.
Do not claim the conjecture is solved merely because smaller-n or structural partial results are available.
